Dialog.name: MSG_FIRST_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5143 0 0}That was quite the trip, but we found a familiar sight beyond that imposing enemy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}It seems rather secure... Can you get it open?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_FIRST_HERO_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This treasure chest isn't locked...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FIRST_FUKA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Huh? You can open it as-is...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FIRST_FUKA_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We are in a rather irregular area... I wonder if that's a special feature of the place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm not detecting any danger, so please, check what's inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_YUKARI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1096 0 0}Ah, there it is. We're gonna open it, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_JUNPEI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}That's what I'm talkin' about! I wonder what's in it this time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_SANADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3086 0 0}And now, we get to reap the rewards. C'mon, let's see what we've got.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_MITSURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4143 0 0}We should be able to open that without worry. Check what's inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_AEGIS_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6106 0 0}This is our reward for victory. May I see what you find?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_AMADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7096 0 0}These open up in such a cool way... I want to try it myself sometime![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 0 0 0}Uh, I-I mean... Never mind! Let's just empty it and move on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_ARAGAKI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9057 0 0}I don't get the big deal about these... but you're gonna open that before we leave, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Koro-chan's excited too! Now, try opening it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FIRST_FUKA_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's similar to the ones you already have, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It was also reacting to the entrance, so there may be some connection there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's possible that other doors elsewhere would react to that card as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_YUKARI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 0 0 0}Well, we're not figuring it out here. Let's move on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_JUNPEI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2123 0 0}Another stupid card? We busted our asses for THAT?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}Hang on—it's too soon to be bummed out! Maybe if we collect enough of 'em, we can trade 'em in for something cool?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_SANADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}That's just a useless card to me, but it has some kind of meaning to you, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}Well, all I need is the opportunity to fight strong opponents. The experience I gain is reward enough for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_MITSURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4106 0 0}Puzzling cards hidden away in this already strange space...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 0 0 0}This Tartarus truly is a tower filled with mysteries.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5060 0 0}Will that card open another door? Who would make such a mechanism, and why...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Well, in any case, well done! I'll await your return.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_AEGIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}A card. Who could have put this here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 0 0 0}Or is it simply coincidence? I do not know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_AMADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7061 0 0}Another tarot card... Are these hinting at something?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 0 0 0}I mean, each one has a certain meaning, right? Maybe I'll look into it later...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_ARAGAKI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9054 0 0}I don't care what's in the damn boxes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 0 0 0}But if there's gonna be another fight like this one, take me with you. I don't wanna miss the chance to throw down like this again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_FUKA_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}I guess this isn't something that would hold Koro-chan's interest. I'll have to get him a treat when we get back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_FUKA_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5137 0 0}There wasn't a tarot card in that one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}If we can't open any of the unopened doors, maybe it's best to come back for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_TEMPERANCE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Temperance Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_DEVIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Devil Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_TOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Tower Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_STAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Star Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_MOON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Moon Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_SUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Sun Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_JUDGEMENT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Judgement Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GET_CARD_TEMPERANCE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Temperance{f 0 1 27}: The next time you do a daily activity, your {f 4 30 0 1 0 0}, {f 4 30 2 1 0 0}, and {f 4 30 1 1 0 0} will increase more than usual for that day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GET_CARD_DEVIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Devil{f 0 1 27}: The number of items obtained by defeating enemies and destroying breakable objects will increase until you quit exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GET_CARD_TOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Tower{f 0 1 27}: All of your current Personas will have their stats increased by 1.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GET_CARD_STAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Star{f 0 1 27}: You will be able to pick one additional card during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GET_CARD_MOON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Moon{f 0 1 27}: All current party members will have their HP and SP fully restored.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GET_CARD_SUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Sun{f 0 1 27}: You will be able to fuse Personas up to 5 levels above your current level until you quit exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_GET_CARD_JUDGEMENT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Judgement{f 0 1 27}: The member of the current party with the lowest level will gain a large amount of EXP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}, the number of Major Arcana cards attainable in a day has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}
